en: And the LORD appeared to him by the oaks of Mamre, as he sat at the door of his tent in the heat of the day.
zh: 耶和華在幔利橡樹那裡，向亞伯拉罕顯現。那時，是一天中最熱的時候，亞伯拉罕正坐在帳棚門口；

en: He lifted up his eyes and looked, and behold, three men were standing in front of him. When he saw them, he ran from the tent door to meet them and bowed himself to the earth
zh: 他舉目觀看，忽然看見三個人在他對面站著；亞伯拉罕看見了，就從帳棚門口跑去迎接他們，俯伏在地，

en: and said, "O Lord, if I have found favor in your sight, do not pass by your servant.
zh: 說：“我主啊，我若在你眼前蒙恩，求你不要離開你的僕人。

en: Let a little water be brought, and wash your feet, and rest yourselves under the tree,
zh: 讓我叫人拿點水來，你們可以洗洗腳，然後在樹下歇一歇。

en: while I bring a morsel of bread, that you may refresh yourselves, and after that you may pass on- since you have come to your servant." So they said, "Do as you have said."
zh: 讓我拿點餅來給你們吃，使你們可以恢復精力，然後再走，因為你們既然到了僕人這裡來，就應該這樣。”他們說：“就照著你所說的去作。”

en: And Abraham went quickly into the tent to Sarah and said, "Quick! Three seahs of fine flour! Knead it, and make cakes."
zh: 亞伯拉罕趕快進帳棚，到撒拉那裡，說：“你快拿三斗細麵調和，作些餅。”

en: And Abraham ran to the herd and took a calf, tender and good, and gave it to a young man, who prepared it quickly.
zh: 亞伯拉罕又跑到牛群裡，牽了一頭又嫩又好的牛犢，交給僕人；僕人就趕快去預備。

en: Then he took curds and milk and the calf that he had prepared, and set it before them. And he stood by them under the tree while they ate.
zh: 亞伯拉罕又拿了乳酪、奶和預備好的牛犢肉來，擺在他們面前。他們吃的時候，亞伯拉罕在樹下侍候他們。

en: They said to him, "Where is Sarah your wife?" And he said, "She is in the tent."
zh: 他們問亞伯拉罕：“你的妻子撒拉在哪裡？”他回答：“在帳棚裡。”

en: The LORD said, "I will surely return to you about this time next year, and Sarah your wife shall have a son." And Sarah was listening at the tent door behind him.
zh: 其中一位說：“到明年這個時候，我必回到你這裡來。那時，你的妻子撒拉必生一個兒子。”撒拉在那人後面的帳棚門口，也聽見了這話。

en: Now Abraham and Sarah were old, advanced in years. The way of women had ceased to be with Sarah.
zh: 當時，亞伯拉罕和撒拉都老了，上了年紀，撒拉的月經也停止了。

en: So Sarah laughed to herself, saying, "After I am worn out, and my lord is old, shall I have pleasure?"
zh: 撒拉心裡暗笑，說：“現在我已經衰老了，我的丈夫也老了，我還有房事的樂趣嗎？”

en: The LORD said to Abraham, "Why did Sarah laugh and say, 'Shall I indeed bear a child, now that I am old?'
zh: 耶和華對亞伯拉罕說：“撒拉為甚麼暗笑說：‘我已經老了，真的還能生育嗎？’

en: Is anything too hard for the LORD? At the appointed time I will return to you about this time next year, and Sarah shall have a son."
zh: 耶和華豈有難成的事嗎？到明年這個時候，我要回到你這裡來，那時，撒拉必生一個兒子。”

en: But Sarah denied it, saying, "I did not laugh," for she was afraid. He said, "No, but you did laugh."
zh: 撒拉害怕起來，就否認，說：“我沒有笑。”但那位說：“不，你實在笑了。”

en: Then the men set out from there, and they looked down toward Sodom. And Abraham went with them to set them on their way.
zh: 三人就從那裡起身，向著所多瑪觀望。亞伯拉罕與他們同行，要送他們一程。

en: The LORD said, "Shall I hide from Abraham what I am about to do,
zh: 耶和華說：“我要作的事，豈可瞞著亞伯拉罕呢？

en: seeing that Abraham shall surely become a great and mighty nation, and all the nations of the earth shall be blessed in him?
zh: 亞伯拉罕必要成為強大興盛的國，地上的萬國，都必因他得福。

en: For I have chosen him, that he may command his children and his household after him to keep the way of the LORD by doing righteousness and justice, so that the LORD may bring to Abraham what he has promised him."
zh: 我揀選了他 ，是要他吩咐子孫，和他的家屬，遵守我耶和華的道，秉公行義，好叫我耶和華應許亞伯拉罕的話都可實現。”

en: Then the LORD said, "Because the outcry against Sodom and Gomorrah is great and their sin is very grave,
zh: 耶和華說：“控告所多瑪和蛾摩拉的聲音甚大，他們的罪惡極重。

en: I will go down to see whether they have done altogether according to the outcry that has come to me. And if not, I will know."
zh: 我現在要下去，看看他們所行的，是不是全像那聲聞於我的控告；如果不是，我也會知道的。”

en: So the men turned from there and went toward Sodom, but Abraham still stood before the LORD.
zh: 其中二人從那裡動身，向所多瑪走去，亞伯拉罕卻仍然站在耶和華面前。

en: Then Abraham drew near and said, "Will you indeed sweep away the righteous with the wicked?
zh: 亞伯拉罕上前說：“你真的要把義人和惡人一同除滅嗎？

en: Suppose there are fifty righteous within the city. Will you then sweep away the place and not spare it for the fifty righteous who are in it?
zh: 假如城中有五十個義人，你還真的要除滅那地方，不為城裡的五十個義人而赦免那地方嗎？

en: Far be it from you to do such a thing, to put the righteous to death with the wicked, so that the righteous fare as the wicked! Far be that from you! Shall not the Judge of all the earth do what is just?"
zh: 你絕不會作這樣的事：把義人與惡人一同殺死，把義人和惡人一樣看待，你絕不會這樣！審判全地的主，豈可不行公義嗎？”

en: And the LORD said, "If I find at Sodom fifty righteous in the city, I will spare the whole place for their sake."
zh: 耶和華說：“我若在所多瑪城中找到五十個義人，我就因他們的緣故，赦免那地方所有的人。”

en: Abraham answered and said, "Behold, I have undertaken to speak to the Lord, I who am but dust and ashes.
zh: 亞伯拉罕回答，說：“我雖然是灰塵，還大膽地對我主說話。

en: Suppose five of the fifty righteous are lacking. Will you destroy the whole city for lack of five?" And he said, "I will not destroy it if I find forty-five there."
zh: 假如這五十個義人中缺少了五個，你會因為缺少了五個就毀滅全城嗎？”他說：“我若在那裡找到四十五個，我也不會毀滅那城。”

en: Again he spoke to him and said, "Suppose forty are found there." He answered, "For the sake of forty I will not do it."
zh: 亞伯拉罕再問他說：“假如在那裡找到四十個呢？”他回答：“我因這四十個的緣故，也不這樣作。”

en: Then he said, "Oh let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak. Suppose thirty are found there." He answered, "I will not do it, if I find thirty there."
zh: 亞伯拉罕說：“請我主不要動怒，容我再問：‘假如在那裡找到三十個呢？’”他回答：“我若在那裡找到三十個，也不這樣作。”

en: He said, "Behold, I have undertaken to speak to the Lord. Suppose twenty are found there." He answered, "For the sake of twenty I will not destroy it."
zh: 亞伯拉罕說：“我再大膽地對我主說，假如在那裡找到二十個呢？”他回答：“我因這二十個的緣故，也不毀滅那城。”

en: Then he said, "Oh let not the Lord be angry, and I will speak again but this once. Suppose ten are found there." He answered, "For the sake of ten I will not destroy it."
zh: 亞伯拉罕說：“請我主不要動怒，容我問這最後的一次，假如在那裡找到十個呢？”他回答：“我因這十個的緣故，也不毀滅那城。”

en: And the LORD went his way, when he had finished speaking to Abraham, and Abraham returned to his place.
zh: 耶和華與亞伯拉罕說完了話，就走了；亞伯拉罕也回到自己的地方去了。
